description: The Legacy Adapter component is used in converted legacy particle systems that were converted to PhotonDust as part of The Performance Updates.

fields.DirectionMode: ``ForceDirection`` and ``ForcedDirection`` converted to PhotonDust direction mode.
fields.Direction0: ``ForceDirection`` and ``ForcedDirection`` converted to PhotonDust direction vector.
fields.Direction1: ``ForceDirection`` and ``ForcedDirection`` converted to PhotonDust direction vector.

usage: Not used directly by the user. part of legacy content.
